title: Aptitude: Letter and Symbol Series - Q1

content.problemStatement:
### **Aptitude Practice Question**

If the symbols followed by consonants interchange their positions within the group, then which element is third from the right end? 
B @ C 7 N R % 5 $ G 6 K M & 4 S # P U 5 

(a) U 
(b) # 
(c) P 
(d) 5 
(e)  None of these

---

### **Answer & Explanation**

b
Explanation:-
Given series – B @ C 7 N R % 5 $ G 6 K M & 4 S # P U 5 
After operation – B C @ 7 N R % 5 G $ 6 K M & 4 S P # U 5
So, third element from the right end = #
